arts.ttl: ‘I don’t have a set date’ - Ter Stegen talks Barca return and Szczęsny
arts.sum: Marc-Andre ter Stegen says he doesn’t yet have a set date regarding when he will return from a long-term knee injury after returning to team training at Barcelona . The goalkeeper is close to a return

arts.ttl: Tebas hits out at Olmo decision and warns of ‘dangerous territory’
arts.sum: “LaLiga denied the prior visa through LaLiga Manager, in accordance with the automated procedures that have been in place for many seasons and officially recognized by the CSD itself. “MY LEGAL OPINION ON THE CSD RESOLUTION After several hours of calmly analyzing the CSD’s decision, I want to express my complete disagreement with the approach adopted in the case of FC Barcelona’s licenses.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal Barcelona contract warning as superagent fears Messi repeat
arts.sum: Barcelona have been warned that Lamine Yamal ’s contract renewal is not a formality, with superagent Jorge Mendes fearing a situation whereby the Catalan club cannot fund a deal, similar to that of Lionel Messi . Lamine Yamal Barcelona contract warning as superagent fears Messi repeat

arts.ttl: Kounde dreaming of Barca quadruple after Atletico win
arts.sum: Kounde also highlighted how Barca can play in different ways under Flick as he looking forward to a Copa del Rey final against Real Madrid . Jules Kounde isn’t getting carried away but did admit he is dreaming of winning the lot with Barcelona this season.

arts.ttl: Former Premier League star 'is robbed in broad daylight' in Barcelona - with 'two people stealing his watch as he paid for parking' after shopping trip
arts.sum: The midfielder is now playing for Girona in LaLiga, on loan from Juventus following a failed temporary stay with Liverpool in the Premier League under Jurgen Klopp two seasons ago.

arts.ttl: Gossip: Barca considering Kean as Lewandowski successor
arts.sum: The report claims that Fiorentina are eager to keep hold of the 25-year-old but know there will be lots of interest in the summer transfer window Moise Kean is in the headlines in Italy with reports claiming the Fiorentina star is wanted by a host of clubs, including Barcelona.

arts.ttl: 3 Barcelona stars have played the most minutes of their careers this season
arts.sum: Three members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona have surpassed their record tallies for minutes played in a single season, in 2024/25. That’s according to Diario Sport,…

arts.ttl: Barcelona captain Marc-Andre ter Stegen opens up on separation from wife and media reporting
arts.sum: Barcelona captain Marc-Andre ter Stegen has explained that the damage done by the reporting of his separation from wife Dani ter Stegen (nee Jehle) remains irreparable. The German goalkeeper announced his parting of ways from Dani in March, and asked for privacy, but shortly after, it was reported that the motive was Jehle’s unfaithfulness. arts.ttl: Barcelona interested in Fiorentina’s Moise Kean
arts.sum: Moise Kean will be one of the hottest properties in Serie A when the transfer window opens in the summer. After all the Fiorentina striker has already scored 16 goals…

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid stars will go head-to-head for top scorer prize in Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: The upcoming Copa del Rey final will see members of the attacking ranks at Barcelona and Real Madrid lock horns for the competition’s top scorer award. The pair in question?…
